title: daphnopsis americana subsp. guatemalensis
intro: Daphnopsis americana subsp. guatemalensis is a plant species, also known as the Guatemalan Daphnopsis, belonging to the family Ebenaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Daphnopsis americana subsp. guatemalensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is said to provide relief from these conditions.
